queries.plan:
Estimate    Actual  Operator
       -         1  PROJECT a1, a2
       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(c_custkey) AS a1, COUNT(a8) AS a2
       -         6  PROJECT c_custkey, o_orderkey
       -         6  PROJECT c_custkey, a8
       -         6  LEFT OUTER JOIN HASH ON PROJECTION_672.c_custkey = PROJECTION_669.o_custkey
       -   1500000  │└PROJECT o_custkey, o_orderkey AS a8, o_orderkey
       -   1500000  │ PROJECT o_orderkey, o_custkey
       -   1500000  │ TABLE SCAN orders
       -         1  PROJECT c_custkey
       -         1  PROJECT c_custkey
       -         1  FILTER (c_custkey = 1) AS a5
       -    150000  TABLE SCAN customer
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(c.c_custkey), COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM (
  SELECT *
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer
  WHERE c_custkey = 1
) AS c
LEFT JOIN tpch_sf1.orders AS o
  ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey;

theorem.description: Count rows after LEFT JOIN from CUSTOMER to ORDERS with a one-sided CUSTOMER key filter
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-LEFT-CUSTOMER-ORDERS-FILTER-CUSTOMER
